package.name: robot_sim
package.description:
Gazebo Classic (Gazebo 11) simulation bringup for the Go2 autonomy stack.
sim_bringup.launch.py launches the full simulation: Gazebo + robot_state_publisher + spawn_entity + slam.launch.py (slam_toolbox, use_sim_time=true) + nav2.launch.py (Nav2, use_sim_time=true) + RViz2
Real-robot go2_hw_bridge is NOT started — Gazebo's planar_move plugin provides the identical /cmd_vel + /odom + TF(odom→base_footprint) interface.
All Nav2 config is shared with the real robot (robot_nav/). Only the sensor bridge and robot model differ.
Portability (TODO(agibot)): ros2 launch robot_sim sim_bringup.launch.py robot:=d1 (requires d1_sim/urdf/d1_sim.urdf.xacro to be implemented)
